---
title: "Track B: Run all (single-ROI)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## What this does
Renders the Track B analysis pages in sequence:

1. Build QC-safe two-wave datasets (toy data)
2. Descriptive GAM trajectory plots
3. LME inference + change–change link

Outputs are written to: `outputs/trackB_singleROI/`

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(quarto)
})

# Files are in the same folder as this runner
files <- c(
  here::here("analysis", "trackB_singleROI", "01_build_long_qc.qmd"),
  here::here("analysis", "trackB_singleROI", "02_gam_trajectory.qmd"),
  here::here("analysis", "trackB_singleROI", "03_lme_and_delta_link.qmd")
)

# Render sequentially
for (f in files) {
  message("Rendering: ", f)
  quarto::quarto_render(input = f, quiet = TRUE)
}

message("DONE. See outputs in: ", here::here("outputs", "trackB_singleROI"))
